tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]F#[/ch] [ch]Bsus2[/ch] [ch]D#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
Girl, our mamas are best friends and so are we[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
The whole town's rooting for us like the home team[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
Most likely to settle down[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B[/ch]
Plant a few roots real deep and let 'em grow[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F#[/ch]
But we can't stop this real world from spinnin' us[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
Your bright lights called, I don't blame you for pickin' up[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D#m[/ch]                                           [ch]B[/ch]
Your big dream bags are all packed up and ready to go[/tab]

But I just need you to know


[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]F#[/ch]
That I love you more than a California sunset[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]B[/ch]
More than a beer when you ain't twenty-one yet[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D#m[/ch]
More than a Sunday morning Lord[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]B[/ch]
Turnin' some poor lost souls 'round, and Hallelujah bound[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F#[/ch]
Yeah, I love you more than the feeling when the bass hits the hook[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]
When the guy gets the girl at the end of the book[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D#m[/ch]                                          [ch]B[/ch]
But, baby, this might be the last time I get to lay you down[/tab]
[tab]                                            [ch]F#[/ch]
'Cause I can't love you more than my hometown[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
I ain't the runaway kind, I can't change that[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bsus2[/ch]
My heart's stuck in these streets like the train tracks[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
City sky ain't the same black[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
Ain't that a map dot shame, man, to think that[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]F#[/ch]
I love you more than a California sunset[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]B[/ch]
More than a beer when you ain't twenty-one yet[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D#m[/ch]
More than a Sunday morning Lord[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]B[/ch]
Turnin' some poor lost souls 'round, and Hallelujah bound[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F#[/ch]
Yeah, I love you more than the feeling when the bass hits the hook[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]
When the guy gets the girl at the end of the book[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D#m[/ch]                                          [ch]B[/ch]
But, baby, this might be the last time I get to lay you down[/tab]
[tab]                                            [ch]F#[/ch]
'Cause I can't love you more than my hometown[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]               [ch]F#[/ch]
Yeah, you got a wild in your eyes that I just wasn't born with[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
I'm a same gas station cup of coffee in the mornin'[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D#m[/ch]
I need a house on the hill, girl, not in 'em[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]B[/ch]
So hang onto these words 'til them avenues help you forget 'em[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]F#[/ch]
'Cause I love you more than a California sunset[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]B[/ch]
I love you more in a twenty-dollar sundress[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D#m[/ch]
Hate that loaded down car you got your keys in[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]B[/ch]
Girl, but I hate even more that you're leavin'[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F#[/ch]
'Cause I love you more than the feeling when the bass hits the hook[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]
When the guy gets the girl at the end of the book[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D#m[/ch]                                         [ch]B[/ch]
But that ain't you and me so I guess I'll see you around[/tab]
[tab]                                            [ch]F#[/ch]
'Cause I can't love you more than my hometown[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]                             [ch]B[/ch]
Love you more than my hometown[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]D#m[/ch]
Love you more than my hometown[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]F#[/ch]
Love you more, baby, love you more[/tab]
